counters.description: just don't even try. her chains will also reveal you in your brush q.
pretty hard, play around your brush q.
hard to lane  against, but in mid-game you basically delete him from the game.
fairly easy. the only issue with this matchup is the miasma that doesn't allow you to even pick up elements since your w is counted as a dash.
quite hard post level 6, she gets a lot of hp + shield and has insane damage output with her cocaine bear

synergies.description: any jungler that can set up fights and create early schermishes is welcome with qiyana
any jungler that can set up fights and create early schermishes is welcome with qiyana
